title: clinopodium therebinthinaceum
intro: Clinopodium therebinthinaceum, also known as Wild Basil or Therebintine, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium therebinthinaceum include relief from digestive issues, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Clinopodium therebinthinaceum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including essential oils and dried herbs.
